summary: Session 27 Virtual Filesystem Layer testing complete. ALL 360 TESTS PASSING across 22 test files. Verified new VFS helpers (resolveBrandAssets, buildBrandVfsMap) in brief-utils.js, SSE emission of generated_images_map with source='brand_vfs' in message-stream.js, frontend iframe VFS injection in PreviewTab.jsx, and merge logic in useDashboardStream.js. context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 27 complete. Virtual Filesystem layer added for brand assets. Key files: lib/ai/brief-utils.js (resolveBrandAssets, buildBrandVfsMap), lib/ai/message-stream.js (SSE emission at line 3910-3914), components/dashboard/tabs/PreviewTab.jsx (parseBrandVfsFromAssetsModule, iframe VFS injection), components/dashboard/useDashboardStream.js (merge logic at line 226-238). Jest suite now at 360/360 tests across 22 files. All tests are pure unit/prompt tests - no DB, no LLM, no HTTP required. The VFS layer enables LLM-generated code like to resolve to uploaded brand asset data URLs at iframe runtime.
